commodity: Cobalt Ore (Democratic Republic of Congo — Glencore)
data_source: AI-Estimated (Llama 3.3 70B inference from web context — not official statistics)

exporters.notes: Kamoto Copper Company (KCC) is a copper and cobalt producer in the DRC, jointly owned by Glencore and Gécamines.

exporters.ownership_note: Chinese state-owned enterprises and policy banks control roughly 80% of cobalt output in the DRC
exporters.notes: Chinese companies control 72% of the cobalt and copper mines in the DRC
The DRC plans to partner with Indonesia to manage global supply and impose export quotas on cobalt
Remaining industrial production is split among a Swiss-based commodity giant, a Kazakh-backed mining company, and others

importers.notes: China's dominance in the cobalt supply chain is a result of its investments in mines in the DRC and its long-term transportation investments in surrounding countries like Tanzania and Zambia
Growing demand for cobalt from other countries, including the US, EU, and Japan
